历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4524 → 4493 → 6073 → 6243 → 6590, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2097 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6590, a backward shift of about 347 places compared to 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 39 in 2021 → 35 in 2022 → 32 in 2023 → 33 in 2024 → 34 in 2025 → 42 in 2026, with a significant expansion of about 23.5% in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.
3. [School Level] Beijing Normal University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking of 19th in the Soft Science ranking, top-tier school level, and sustained appeal to high-scoring Physics Category candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative issues; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 37th); in 2022, there was an abnormal admission situation in Jiangxi but it did not involve Hubei, so its impact on Hubei candidates' application psychology is limited; Psychology A+, Mathematics A, Statistics A, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Physics A-, etc., strong basic science disciplines, have strong appeal to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science was rated as recommended in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended (76.86), Electrical Engineering is highly recommended (74.28), and popular science and engineering majors continue to have high popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 253,000, a slight increase of about 1.2% compared to 2025 (about 250,000); the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 426 points, with slight fluctuations in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6590, a significant expansion of about 23.5% in the 2026 plan, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates, high popularity of popular science and engineering majors, and top-tier school level; considering the large expansion but fierce competition in popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the predicted ranking is slightly adjusted forward from 7520 to 7490, with a range of 6990–7990.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 6990–7990, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors require a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range (within 6990) to attempt, and Tier 3 majors serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings within 7200 can focus on attempting the Science Experimental Class and the Psychology Joint Degree; those with rankings between 7200–7700 should mainly consider popular Tier 2 majors like Statistics, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence; those with rankings near 7990 should use Finance and Public Administration as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 587 → 657 → 552 → 571 → 696, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 696, which is about 125 places lower than 2024, and a cumulative decline of about 144 places over the past three years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 27 students in both 2021 and 2022, dropped to 20 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and rebounded to 21 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22 students, a slight expansion of about 4.8% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 13th in 2021, 17th in 2022, and stabilized at 19th from 2023 to 2026, firmly in the top 20 nationally, with a top-tier academic level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2022, there was an abnormal signal of a significant drop in admission rankings in Jiangxi, but it did not affect Hubei, so its impact on Hubei candidates' application psychology is limited. Six disciplines—Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory—received A+ ratings, and another six disciplines, including Physical Education, Mathematics, and Statistics, received A ratings. A total of 18 disciplines are rated A- or above, demonstrating top-tier academic strength, which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The popularity of teacher training/education majors in 2024 was assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, cooling down compared to 2023. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in the province is about 141,000, roughly the same as in 2025. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 442 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.
7. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 696, a slight expansion of about 4.8% in the 2026 plan, a roughly stable number of candidates, a stable university reputation, and divergent popularity of teacher training majors, and considering the small expansion scale and the strong attraction of a top-tier university to candidates, the predicted ranking is slightly adjusted upward from 716 to 726, with a range of 639–813.
